title: Supply Chain Manager - DTDC International Enterprises - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - DTDC International Enterprises - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
DTDC International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Supply Chain Manager at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About DTDC International Enterprises:
DTDC International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC International Enterprises!
